sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72609" key="oi)o/kerws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰόκερως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κέρας</etym>) <sense id="n72609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one-horned,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:96" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.96</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
